---
title: "Learning"
author: "Milaotou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
    css: F:/openclaw/Githubpush/styles.css
---
# <span style="display: none;">设置代码块全局选项</span>{.unnumbered}
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
 knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	fig.align = "center",
	fig.height = 8,
	fig.width = 10,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	tidy = TRUE
 )
```

```{r}
########################################
# 步骤1：图形的适用范围与优势（说明）
########################################
# 这类“径向（极坐标）小提琴+箱线图”适用于比较多个分组的数值分布，
# 在圆形布局下同时展示分布形状（小提琴）和集中趋势（箱线），
# 常用于生物信息学/传染病学等领域比较不同毒株/条件的测定值。
# 优点包括：高信息密度、节省横向空间、可在外圈直观标注分组名称，
# 并可添加径向或角度方向的参考线与标签以突出重点。

########################################
# 加载必要的包
########################################
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(ggbeeswarm)  
library(ggpubr) 

########################################
# 设置随机种子保证结果可重复
########################################
set.seed(123)

########################################
# 步骤2：生成示例数据（与网页结构一致）
########################################
# 定义分组因子水平
groups_levels <- c(
  "SARS-CoV-2","SARS-CoV-2 Delta","SARS-CoV-2 Beta",
  "SARS-CoV-2 Mu","Bat CoV BANAL-52","Pangolin CoV GD-1",
  "SARS-CoV-2 Omicron BA.1","SARS-CoV-2 Omicron BA.2",
  "Bat CoV RaTG13","Pangolin CoV GX-P5L","SARS-CoV-1"
)

# 为每个分组设定不同的规模参数，用于模拟右偏的正值分布（如抗体滴度）
# 这里用 log-normal 生成，并在不同组上设定不同的均值尺度
set_scale <- tibble(
  group = factor(groups_levels, levels = groups_levels),
  mu    = c(1.6, 1.8, 1.7, 1.5, 1.2, 1.1, 1.9, 2.0, 1.3, 1.25, 1.6),
  sigma = c(0.35,0.40,0.38,0.33,0.30,0.28,0.45,0.42,0.32,0.31,0.36)
)

# 每组生成 60 个观测值，并分配到 Sample1–Sample5 五列（每列12个）
n_per_group <- 60
n_samples   <- 5
sample_names <- paste0("Sample", 1:n_samples)

sim_list <- set_scale %>%
  group_split(group) %>%
  map(function(df) {
    g  <- df$group[1]
    mu <- df$mu[1]
    sg <- df$sigma[1]
    vals <- rlnorm(n_per_group, meanlog = mu, sdlog = sg)
    # 按列切分到 Sample1–Sample5
    mat <- matrix(vals, ncol = n_samples, byrow = TRUE)
    tibble(group = g) %>%
      bind_cols(as_tibble(mat, .name_repair = ~ sample_names))
  })

data_wide <- bind_rows(sim_list)

# 若需要与您的脚本一致地从 Excel 读入，可将 data_wide 写出再读入：
# write.xlsx(data_wide, "data.xlsx")  # 需要 openxlsx 或 writexl
# data <- read_excel("data.xlsx")     # 与网页代码保持一致的读入方式

# 本示例直接把模拟数据赋给 data
data <- data_wide

########################################
# 步骤3：整理并复现实图的完整代码（尽量与网页一致）
########################################

# 将数据从宽格式转换为长格式
data <- data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Sample"),
    names_to = "Sample",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

# 计算每组的最大值与均值（网页中用到了 max 和 mean 标签）
data <- data %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  mutate(
    max  = max(Value),
    mean = mean(Value)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# 定义分组顺序（因子水平）
data$group <- factor(
  data$group,
  levels = c("SARS-CoV-2","SARS-CoV-2 Delta","SARS-CoV-2 Beta",
             "SARS-CoV-2 Mu","Bat CoV BANAL-52","Pangolin CoV GD-1",
             "SARS-CoV-2 Omicron BA.1","SARS-CoV-2 Omicron BA.2",
             "Bat CoV RaTG13","Pangolin CoV GX-P5L","SARS-CoV-1")
)

# 定义颜色（填充与边框）
my_color <- c("#b09ac9","#2ac4f4","#7aced6","#b09ac9","#f9af8b","#f48d8e",
              "#2c165a","#3364af","#ed1d23","#007c8a","#f16221")

my_color1 <- c("#2c165a","#3364af","#007c8a","#2c165a","#f16221","#eb1c22",
               "#b09ac9","#2ac4f4","#f58e8f","#7aced6","#f8ab85")
library(geomtextpath)
# 绘图
p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = group, y = log10(Value))) +
  geom_violin(aes(fill = group, color = group),
              width = 0.4, scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, size = 0.3, staplewidth = 0.5) +
  # 设置Y轴范围，且不扩展
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 2)) +
  # 添加垂直线 (x = 11.7处)
  annotate("segment", x = 11.7, xend = 11.7, y = 0, yend = 2, linewidth = 0.3) +
  # 设置填充颜色与边框颜色
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_color) +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_color1) +
  # 极坐标变换（用兼容封装的 coord_radial）
  coord_radial(start = -pi/2,
               end = pi/2,
               r.axis.inside = TRUE,
               inner.radius = 0.1,
               rotate.angle = TRUE,
               clip = "off") +
  # 添加径向标签，并设置文本颜色（外圈显示分组名称）
  geom_text(
    data = distinct(data, group),
    aes(x = group, y = 2, label = group, color = group),
    angle = 90, hjust = -0.05, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  # 添加均值标签（显示 log10(max) 的位置上标注组内均值）
  geom_text(
    data = distinct(data, group, mean, max),
    aes(x = group, y = log10(max) + 0.2, label = sprintf("%.1f", mean)),
    hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, size = 3.5
  ) +
  # 设置主题
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title  = element_blank(),                 # 不显示X和Y坐标轴标题
    axis.line   = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),  # 坐标轴线样式
    axis.ticks  = element_line(color = "black"),   # 刻度线颜色
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),   # 隐藏原x轴(角度轴)标签
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  # y轴(半径轴)标签样式
    panel.grid  = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),   # 网格线粗细
    legend.position = "none",                      # 不显示图例
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)            # 四周边距：上/右/下/左
  )

# 显示图形
print(p)
png("扇形提琴图.png",width = 8,height = 6,unit = "in",res = 300,family = "serif")
dev.off()

# Save as PNG
ggsave("扇形提琴图.png", width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

# Session info
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
